FridgeChef.step1: Marinate shrimp with salt and pepper for 5 minutes
FridgeChef.step2: Beat eggs, scramble until half cooked, set aside
FridgeChef.step3: Heat oil, cook shrimp until pink
FridgeChef.step5: Add eggs and green onions, stir-fry on high heat
FridgeChef.step7: Cut beef, blanch to remove foam
FridgeChef.step8: Cut potatoes, carrots, and tomatoes into chunks
FridgeChef.step9: Heat oil, sauté onion until fragrant
FridgeChef.step10: Add tomatoes and cook until juicy
FridgeChef.step11: Add water and beef, bring to boil
FridgeChef.step13: Add potatoes and carrots, simmer 20 more minutes
FridgeChef.step18: Heat olive oil, sauté minced garlic
FridgeChef.step19: Add chicken, cook until changed color
FridgeChef.tip2: High heat keeps rice grains separate
FridgeChef.tip4: Keep at gentle boil for best results
FridgeChef.tip5: Don't overcook chicken or it'll be tough
FridgeChef.tip6: Blanch broccoli to keep it green
